text: 収集：ディンゲールの腕

す！
集めた数が多ければ多いほど
報酬も増えますからね！

※Lv.60以上のディンゲールが対象

Attention all ARKS ops!
You are hereby requested to collect as many of
the designated item as you can.

You will receive your reward when you report in.
The more you collect, the greater your reward.

Target: Dingales Level 60 or above
